android.widget.TextView.text: I’m not sure what you mean by “Me a lot on cars.” 🤔🚗
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: “Teach me a lot about cars” (how they work, types, engines, etc.)
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: “Tell me a lot about cars” (general information)
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: “Recommend a lot of cars” (different models to look at)
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: “Help me learn cars as a beginner”
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: Tell me what you want to learn about cars, for example:
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: Just reply with what you meant, and I’ll explain!
android.widget.TextView.heading: false
